title: Origins: Pandora's Actor
description: An Origin capable of shapeshifting into any other origin on your Singleplayer World / Server, and use their powers as your own. (For Fabric)
body:
# Pandora's Actor (updated for Minecraft version 1.20.2, Origins version 1.12.8) impact: 3, Icon: Brown Dye
_"You're a Greater Doppelganger, capable of mimicing all other origins and of using their powers as your own."_

### "Incredible Mimicry"(Active Power):
- [+] You can change into any other origin on your world / server by pressing "key.Advancements" and Sneaking. `Shift + L by Default`
- [+] These powers will stay with you until you use an orb of origins.
- [+] You can hide your armor by pressing "key.playerlist" while sneaking. `Shift + Tab by default`
- [+] These Powers are always active.

### "Weaknesses":
 _"All of this flexibility comes at a terrible cost."_
- [-] You can't sleep.
- [-] You deal 33% less damage.
- [-] You take 33% more damage.
- [-] Uncomfortable in your skin, you shake while shapeshifting as another Origin.
- [-] These Weaknesses are always active.
  
_Origin by Frucs :) inspired by Pandora's Actor, a Greater Doppelganger from Overlord, the anime._

### New in 1.02:
- Choosing Pandora's Actor in the Choose your Origin GUI will reset your Origin into Pandora's Actor and remove all other powers you may have had! 
- Respawning / logging in and out will now also do this.
- - Having a fresh reset like this will fix many issues such as other Origins giving you hidden powers that do not remove themselves.
2024-04-20 Update! I removed 1.02 for now because of a bug that it introduced, and uploaded 1.01
